title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Sika India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Sika India
jsonLd.description:
We at Sika India are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Varanasi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Sika India:
Sika India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sika India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
